subject: Cannot access account after password reset
body: I tried to reset my password but now I cannot log in. It says invalid credentials. Please help, this is blocking access to my dashboard.

subject: Billing: unexpected charge on invoice
body: I was charged twice this month. The invoice shows an extra fee labeled 'service surcharge'. Please refund and explain.

subject: Feature request: export data in CSV
body: Our team needs a CSV export of reports. Currently only PDF is available. Please add CSV export or an API endpoint.

subject: App crashes when uploading image
body: When I upload an image to the profile page, the app crashes with a 500 error. Reproducible every time.

subject: Request to change billing contact information
body: Please update our billing contact email to billing@example.com and send future invoices there.

subject: Question about pricing tiers
body: What's the difference between Pro and Enterprise? We need SSO and higher limits.

subject: Slow performance on reports page
body: The reports page takes over 30 seconds to load for large datasets. Can you investigate performance?

subject: Unable to reset 2FA
body: I lost access to my 2FA app and cannot reset it. Need account recovery assistance.

subject: Integration failing with API 401
body: Our integration started getting 401 responses after last deploy. Tokens appear valid. Please help troubleshoot.

subject: Question: how to add multiple team members
body: I want to invite 10 team members at once. Is there a bulk invite option?
